repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Manuscripts,Photographs, Printed Materials, Publications, Scrapbooks
did.abstract: Records of the Cornell University Christian Association.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell United Religious Work records, #39-2-1468. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Records of the Cornell University Christian Association include minutes of the Board of Directors, business meetings, the Executive Committee, and other committees; constitution and bylaws; officers and members; financial records; scrapbooks; and office files of Richard Henry Edwards, Director. Records of Cornell United Religious Work include minutes of the Board of Control; office files of Richard H. Edwards, Director, 1930-1939, James A. G. Moore, Acting Director, 1937-1939, and William W. Mendenhall, 1939-1943; scrapbooks; and correspondence relating to the functions and activities of CURW, 1932-1933. Also, tape recordings of the National Association of College Chaplains Conference, 1965; portraits; memorabilia; and miscellaneous reports, books, clippings, pamphlets, photograph albums, and periodicals relating to CURW activities.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes records of the East Harlem Project (1965-68), POWER Project files (1968), and the Cornell in Central America Project (1953-1969); and a report on the Brazil '65 Project, designed to interest North American students in the development issues of Latin America.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to collections #39-2-1267, "Power" Project 1968 files and #39-2-1268, East Harlem Project, 1965-1968 files restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell United Religious Work. Sage Chapel Records, #39-2-1300 for programs, sermons, and other relateid items.
